ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_region_code" TEXT /* Code for the country or region */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Name of the country or region */,
  "iso_3166_2_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-2 code for the country or region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_regions" (
  "sub_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the sub-region belongs to */,
  "sub_region_1" TEXT /* Name of the first-level sub-region */,
  "sub_region_2" TEXT /* Name of the second-level sub-region */,
  "sub_region_population" INTEGER /* Population of the sub-region */,
  "sub_region_land_area" REAL /* Land area of the sub-region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metro_areas" (
  "metro_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metropolitan area */,
  "sub_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-region the metropolitan area belongs to */,
  "metro_area" TEXT /* Name of the metropolitan area */,
  "metro_area_population" INTEGER /* Population of the metropolitan area */,
  "metro_area_land_area" REAL /* Land area of the metropolitan area in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metro_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metro_areas_sub_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_region_id") REFERENCES sub_regions ("sub_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "places" (
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each place */,
  "metro_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metropolitan area the place belongs to */,
  "place_name" TEXT /* Name of the place */,
  "census_fips_code" INTEGER /* Census FIPS code for the place */,
  "place_population" INTEGER /* Population of the place */,
  "place_land_area" REAL /* Land area of the place in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("place_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_places_metro_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("metro_area_id") REFERENCES metro_areas ("metro_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mobility_data" (
  "mobility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mobility data point */,
  "place_id" INTEGER /* ID of the place the mobility data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the mobility data was collected */,
  "retail_and_recreation_percent_change_from_baseline" REAL /* Percentage change in movement to retail and recreation locations from the baseline */,
  "grocery_and_pharmacy_percent_change_from_baseline" REAL /* Percentage change in movement to grocery and pharmacy locations from the baseline */,
  "parks_percent_change_from_baseline" REAL /* Percentage change in movement to parks from the baseline */,
  "transit_stations_percent_change_from_baseline" REAL /* Percentage change in movement to transit stations from the baseline */,
  "workplaces_percent_change_from_baseline" REAL /* Percentage change in movement to workplaces from the baseline */,
  "residential_percent_change_from_baseline" REAL /* Percentage change in movement to residential locations from the baseline */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the mobility data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the mobility data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mobility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobility_data_place_id FOREIGN KEY ("place_id") REFERENCES places ("place_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "mobility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mobility data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the mobility data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the mobility data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_mobility_id FOREIGN KEY ("mobility_id") REFERENCES mobility_data ("mobility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "mobility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mobility data being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_mobility_id FOREIGN KEY ("mobility_id") REFERENCES mobility_data ("mobility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "mobility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mobility data being evaluated */,
  "quality_date" TEXT /* Date the quality metric was calculated */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data (e.g., 0-1) */,
  "quality_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_mobility_id FOREIGN KEY ("mobility_id") REFERENCES mobility_data ("mobility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)
